summary: Solid test suite with comprehensive coverage of core requirements. Tests cover secret classification (expired/warning/ok), report generation, both output formats (markdown/JSON), file I/O, error handling, and end-to-end workflow validation via act with realistic fixtures. Workflow structure tests verify triggers, permissions, job dependencies, and actionlint compliance. Main gaps: no tests for empty secret lists, missing validation of extreme WarningDays values, and some parameter edge cases. The act harness fixture-based approach with exact expected output is rigorous but somewhat brittle. One questionable assertion in Workflow.Tests.ps1 (checking for 'Run.Path' in YAML seems off). Would catch most regressions in classification logic, exit codes, output formats, and workflow structure, but would miss edge cases around empty inputs and unusual parameter combinations.
